g.text: • Premiership • Season 1 • Week 12/38 • Cash £9,139k • Next: vs Charlton (H) • Tactic 3-5-2
A flick on from _P1_ waits for the one two
_P1_ traps it with his thigh and flicks on to _P0_
_P0_ slips past his man and collects _P1_'s perfectly timed cross.
Archie Cleeremans (Chelsea) down — injury, out ~1 wk.
Alain Burdett (Everton) down — injury, out ~4 wk.
Royston Kavanaugh (Everton) down — injury, out ~2 wk.
Yasser Havelock (Everton) down — injury, out ~1 wk.
_P1_ needles it through the opponent's feet and finds _P0_
